response.global_analysis: Audio transitions from a song performance to a conversational segment. The reference lyrics in the JSON for 'Kaguya no Shiro de Odoritai' are not actively sung in this clip (mostly instrumental/interjections during the performance), so I have discarded them. I used on-screen text to confirm the name of the upcoming concert ('Kirurun Daisakusen') and the venue ('K-Arena Yokohama'). Timestamps are strictly tied to the vocal audio, ensuring no bleeding between entries.

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.english: So, with everyone from the 3rd generation,

subtitles.original: ちょっと可愛いんじゃない？

subtitles.english: your movements are a bit...

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、あの、素敵に…
subtitles.english: Well, you know, beautifully...

subtitles.original: 可愛いですか？
subtitles.english: Am I cute?

subtitles.original: 可愛い！

subtitles.original: 凄いね、なんかここがね…
subtitles.english: It's amazing, like, this part right here...

subtitles.original: ね、重い、ここ大丈夫ですか？

subtitles.original: おっぱいがお尻だよ、ノエちゃん。
subtitles.english: Your breasts are like butts, No-chan.

subtitles.original: こんなのおっぱいに挨拶しちゃう。
subtitles.english: I'm going to greet breasts like these.

subtitles.original: いや、でも今日からはさ、こう話せばいいのか？
subtitles.english: No, but from today on, should I talk like this?

subtitles.original: そんなわけないだろ！
subtitles.english: As if that would happen!

subtitles.original: 今回のね衣装はね、あの、200万人の記念で、
subtitles.english: This outfit was made to commemorate

subtitles.original: はい、作っていただきました。

subtitles.original: おお！
subtitles.english: Oh!

subtitles.original: 他にも変わったところ、今日のライブからであるんだけど…

subtitles.original: そうなんですよ。ちょっとメイク変わりました。え、大丈夫？
subtitles.english: That's right. My makeup changed a bit. Is it okay?

subtitles.original: 全然違う！可愛い！
subtitles.english: It's completely different! So cute!

subtitles.original: ちなみにお気に入りの顔がありましてね…
subtitles.english: By the way, I have a favorite expression...

subtitles.original: お困り顔、お困り顔がね。
subtitles.english: the troubled face, the troubled face.

subtitles.english: Ah, it's true! It's shaped like a chestnut!

subtitles.original: こだわりの…食べちゃおう…
subtitles.english: The attention to detail... let's eat it...

subtitles.original: うわあ！
subtitles.english: Whoa!

subtitles.original: うわあじゃなかった。え、じゃあちょっと衣装、せっかくなんで…
subtitles.english: It wasn't 'whoa'. Well, since we're here, let's look at the outfit...

subtitles.original: おろ、可愛い！お靴！
subtitles.english: Oh, they're cute! The shoes!

subtitles.original: 可愛いです！
subtitles.english: They're cute!

subtitles.original: リボンついてる！普段はね、通常でぺったんこだから、
subtitles.english: They have ribbons! Usually, I wear flats,

subtitles.original: ちょっと身長盛りました。
subtitles.english: so I added some height.

subtitles.original: リボン二個構え、後ろにね！
subtitles.english: There are two ribbons on the back!

subtitles.original: そうなんですよ。え、可愛い！
subtitles.english: That's right. Wow, cute!

subtitles.original: いいね、いいね！じゃあちょっと舐めるように…
subtitles.english: Nice, nice! Now, let's scan upwards...

subtitles.original: ううう！
subtitles.english: Ooooh!

subtitles.original: 一体どんなおぱんつ…
subtitles.english: What kind of panties are you wearing...

subtitles.original: あ、これ！
subtitles.english: Ah, this!

subtitles.original: なに変態モード？好奇心が…
subtitles.english: What's with the pervert mode? Your curiosity is...

subtitles.original: え、こんな感じで…え、ちょっとそんなサササと終わんないよ。
subtitles.english: Well, like this... hey, don't finish it so quickly.

subtitles.original: まだ舐めてる最中。
subtitles.english: We're still in the middle of scanning.

subtitles.original: あああ！ノエルちゃん！
subtitles.english: Aaaa! Noel-chan!

subtitles.original: ここね！ノエルちゃんじゃなくて、ノエルちゃん！
subtitles.english: Here! It's not Noel-chan, it's Noel-chan!

subtitles.original: 皆さんご覧ください、ここなのこのこのこのこの胸の…
subtitles.english: Everyone, please look, this this this this chest part...

subtitles.original: ここなの…この隙間隙間隙間！
subtitles.english: right here... this gap, gap, gap!

subtitles.original: 分かります？このちちとちちの間の隙間。
subtitles.english: Do you see it? This gap between my breasts.

subtitles.original: 本当だ、凄いね！
subtitles.english: It's true, it's amazing!

subtitles.original: この穴…隙間がね、ほら！
subtitles.english: This hole... the gap, look!

subtitles.original: うわあ！
subtitles.english: Whoa!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫でこか？大丈夫でこか？
subtitles.english: Is it okay to look? Is it okay to look?

subtitles.original: 最高の衣装！
subtitles.english: The best outfit ever!

subtitles.original: じゃあちょっと上見せるにあたって、このヒラヒラ取れるから、
subtitles.english: To show the top part better, these frills can be removed,

subtitles.original: ちょっと…ちょっと取ってもいい？
subtitles.english: so... can I take them off?

subtitles.original: あ、取ってみて、取ってみて！はい！取ってください！
subtitles.english: Ah, try it, try it! Yes! Please take them off!

subtitles.original: おお！見やすい！
subtitles.english: Oh! It's much easier to see!

subtitles.original: そう、見やすい。バンザイ！
subtitles.english: Yes, easy to see. Banzai!

subtitles.original: え、横はどうなっているのか？
subtitles.english: Eh, what does it look like from the side?

subtitles.original: ゆっくりくるくる回って。
subtitles.english: Turn around slowly.

subtitles.original: くるくるくる…
subtitles.english: Spin, spin, spin...

subtitles.original: あ、髪の毛可愛い！髪の毛ふわふわで可愛い！
subtitles.english: Ah, the hair is cute! It's so fluffy and cute!

subtitles.original: ふわふわだよ！髪型めちゃ可愛い！え、お姫様！
subtitles.english: It's fluffy! The hairstyle is super cute! Like a princess!

subtitles.original: え、なんかリボンがこう髪にね、こう巻き込んである感じで。
subtitles.english: It's like the ribbons are wrapped into the hair.

subtitles.original: そうなんね。編み込んで。え、エッチも言ってましたけど、
subtitles.english: That's right. They're braided in. I mentioned being an "Ecchi-mo",

subtitles.original: 姫騎士なんで、お姫様。
subtitles.english: but since I'm a Princess Knight, I'm a princess.

subtitles.original: 可愛すぎる！こんなの好きになっちゃう。
subtitles.english: Too cute! I'm going to end up falling for this.

subtitles.original: ちょっと彼氏面したいからちょっといつもの動きして。
subtitles.english: I want to act like a boyfriend, so do your usual move.

subtitles.original: 待ってた、待ってた！あはは！なんか好きじゃなくなった。
subtitles.english: I've been waiting for that! Ahaha! I don't like it anymore.

subtitles.original: なんでよ！
subtitles.english: Why?!

subtitles.original: 危ない、危ない。恋するところだった。
subtitles.english: That was close. I almost fell in love.

subtitles.original: いや、でも本当に可愛い衣装、本当にありがとう。
subtitles.english: But really, it's a lovely outfit. Thank you so much.

subtitles.original: 新衣装お披露目だったから、皆にはちょっと
subtitles.english: Since it was my new outfit debut,

subtitles.original: アイドル衣装だったんですけど。
subtitles.english: everyone else was in their idol outfits.

subtitles.original: そう、え、皆もさ、衣装持ってるじゃん。
subtitles.english: Right, but everyone else has their own outfits too.

subtitles.original: お、そうよね。並んだりとかも今後したいな。
subtitles.english: Oh, that's right. I'd love to stand in line with you all later.

subtitles.original: 絶対しよう！また歌って踊りたいな！
subtitles.english: Let's definitely do it! I want to sing and dance together again!

subtitles.original: え、ちょっとそれ、お楽しみに！あったかな？
subtitles.english: Wait, look forward to that! Was there such a plan?

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、ここから大事なお知らせをたくさんしていきます！
subtitles.english: Yes! So, I have many important announcements to make from here!

subtitles.original: お願いします！
subtitles.english: Please go ahead!

subtitles.original: ホロライブ3期生の単独ライブ、『ききみるるん大作戦』開催決定しております！
subtitles.english: The hololive 3rd generation's solo live, "Kirurun Daisakusen", has been confirmed!

subtitles.original: イエイ！おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Yay! Congratulations!

subtitles.original: 2026年1月の17日と18日の二日間にわたって開催されます！
subtitles.english: It will be held over two days, January 17th and 18th, 2026!

subtitles.original: いや、会場はね、あのデッカイ、Kアリーナ横浜となってます。
subtitles.english: And the venue is that huge one, K-Arena Yokohama.

subtitles.original: 昨日ね、なんと、まちょっと二次先行…ちょうどね、終わったことなんだけど。
subtitles.english: Yesterday, the second lottery... it just ended, actually.

subtitles.original: なんかね、このあと、ま先着の一般販売が12月の14日…
subtitles.english: Somehow, after this, general sales start on December 14th...
